name: Reduced Fat Beef & Salsa Burritos
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, cook the ground beef over medium heat for 10 to 12 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
2. Pour off any drippings from the beef.
3. Season the cooked beef with chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in the thawed and drained spinach and salsa; cook through.
5. Remove the skillet from heat and stir in the shredded lowfat cheddar cheese.
6. Spoon about 1/2 cup of the beef mixture into the center of each tortilla.
7. Fold the bottom edge up over the filling, then fold the sides to the center, overlapping the edges.
8. This recipe yields 10 servings. Each serving contains approximately 200 calories and 4 grams (fat free cheese) or 8 grams (regular cheese) of fat.
[per Serving Calories 200 Fat 4 grams (fat free cheese); 8 grams (regular cheese)]
Notes: Recipe from DIABETES911 at http://www.Diabetes911.com/recipes.htm
